title: stelis coronaria
intro: Stelis coronaria, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis coronaria include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although the effectiveness and safety of these preparations have not been extensively scientifically studied.
